title: Polish Potato Pierogi
description: Traditional Polish dish filled with a delicious potato and cheese filling, served with a side of creamy sauce.
instructions: Combine warm water, yeast, and 1 tablespoon of sugar in a large mixing bowl. Let it sit for 5-10 minutes, until frothy.
Add flour, salt, and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5-7 minutes, until smooth and elastic.
Divide the dough into 2 equal pieces and roll out each piece into a thin sheet.
Combine grated cheese, diced potato, and tra in a bowl.
Place small spoonfuls of the potato mixture onto the dough, leaving space between each pierogi.
Fold the dough over the filling and press edges together to seal the pierogi.
Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and gently add the pierogi.
Cook for 5-7 minutes, until they float to the surface.
Serve with a side of creamy sauce made from melted butter, milk, and grated cheese.
